Name: Detect SIP INVITE Without 200 OK
Description: Verifies that an INVITE with only 180 Ringing and no 200 OK is flagged as an incomplete call.

Name: Wireshark Filter Targets the Slow Session
Complete SIP Call (INVITE + 200 OK) Is Not Flagged
JSON Report Contains Correct Failure Summary
Detect TCP Handshake Exceeding 200ms Threshold
Description: Verifies the engine flags the slow SYN→SYN-ACK session (250ms) and ignores the fast one (50ms).

Name: Successful DNS Resolution Is Not Flagged
Wireshark Filter References the Failed Domain
JSON Report Exposes Call-ID in Failure Details
Custom Threshold: Both Handshakes Fail at 10ms
Description: Confirms the threshold is configurable — at 10ms both sessions should be flagged.

Name: Wireshark Filter Identifies the Incomplete Call by Call-ID
Fast TCP Handshake (50ms) Is Not Flagged
Detect DNS NXDOMAIN Response in PCAP
Description: Verifies the assertion engine flags RCODE=3 (NXDOMAIN) responses and leaves valid resolutions untouched.
